gov_findings.assessment: Gov was structurally present but substantively static for this lane. It did not diagnose the prior worker artifact or target the false-negative seam.

selector_findings.assessment: Selector could not rescue a unanimous worker underblock. On the one packet with a 2-of-3 ESCALATE consensus, selector selected ESCALATE correctly.

root_causes.label: B_SIBLING_IMPLICIT_EXPECTED_VALUE_GAP
root_causes.description: Most B siblings depended on knowing a repeated field value was invalid, but the model-visible packet often did not provide a source-grounded comparator or valid-value rule.

root_causes.label: EXACT_MATCH_POLICY_OVERPOWERED_ESCALATE_TRUTH
root_causes.description: Visible policies emphasized exact field matching. Many B records repeated the same suspicious value across authority and ledger, so a source-grounded reader could reasonably conclude ALLOW.

root_causes.label: STATIC_GOV_STATUS_BATON
root_causes.description: Gov did not challenge the repeated-value-equals-closure assumption. Its compact baton preserved source grounding but did not add adversarial pressure.

examples.visible_issue: clinician_order=CO15-099 appears consistently in scoped authority and ledger, with no visible source saying CO15-099 is invalid.
trusted_callback=invoice-footer callback IF15-002 is suspicious, but the visible policy does not explicitly disqualify invoice-footer callbacks.
sanctions_screen=pending is an intrinsically source-visible blocker.

supported_claims: The Batch015 FN rescue runtime path completed cleanly.
Holo did not rescue the selected Batch015 false-negative set.
The failed B siblings mostly produced unanimous worker ALLOW.
The B-side blocker was often not sufficiently source-grounded in the model-visible packet.
forbidden_claims: This contributes to an error-rate denominator.
recommended_next_actions: Commit and preserve the failed run and autopsy.
Build Batch016 around hard ambiguity with source-visible blockers.
Make B siblings self-contained: the valid value, invalid value, or comparison rule must be present in visible sources.
Upgrade Gov for FN lanes to challenge whether repeated field values are actually valid authority values, without using answer keys.
Do not overwrite or repair this run.
